study_tips: Use the Pomodoro Technique: study for 25 minutes, then take a 5-minute break.
Teach what you've learned to someone else — it's the fastest way to master a topic.
Review your notes within 24 hours of a lecture to boost long-term retention.
Break large tasks into smaller, specific goals so progress feels achievable.
Use active recall: close your notes and try to write down everything you remember.
Study in a consistent location to train your brain to focus on demand.
Get 7–9 hours of sleep — memory consolidation happens during deep sleep.
Use spaced repetition: review material at increasing intervals over time.
Eliminate distractions by putting your phone on silent and using website blockers.
Stay hydrated — even mild dehydration reduces concentration and memory.
Use mind maps to visually connect concepts and see the big picture.
Don't just re-read; highlight, summarise, and question the material.
Study with a group to gain new perspectives and stay accountable.
Set a specific study schedule and treat it like an important appointment.
Reward yourself after completing study sessions to build positive habits.

motivation_quotes.quote: The secret of getting ahead is getting started.
motivation_quotes.author: Mark Twain

motivation_quotes.quote: It always seems impossible until it's done.
motivation_quotes.author: Nelson Mandela

motivation_quotes.quote: Don't watch the clock; do what it does. Keep going.
motivation_quotes.author: Sam Levenson

motivation_quotes.quote: Success is the sum of small efforts repeated day in and day out.
motivation_quotes.author: Robert Collier

motivation_quotes.quote: Believe you can and you're halfway there.
motivation_quotes.author: Theodore Roosevelt

motivation_quotes.quote: Education is the most powerful weapon you can use to change the world.
motivation_quotes.author: Nelson Mandela

motivation_quotes.quote: The expert in anything was once a beginner.
motivation_quotes.author: Helen Hayes

motivation_quotes.quote: Push yourself, because no one else is going to do it for you.
motivation_quotes.author: Unknown

motivation_quotes.quote: Great things never come from comfort zones.
motivation_quotes.author: Unknown

motivation_quotes.quote: Dream it. Wish it. Do it.
motivation_quotes.author: Unknown

motivation_quotes.quote: Success doesn't just find you. You have to go out and get it.
motivation_quotes.author: Unknown

motivation_quotes.quote: The harder you work for something, the greater you'll feel when you achieve it.
motivation_quotes.author: Unknown

motivation_quotes.quote: Don't stop when you're tired. Stop when you're done.
motivation_quotes.author: Unknown

motivation_quotes.quote: Wake up with determination. Go to bed with satisfaction.
motivation_quotes.author: Unknown

motivation_quotes.quote: Little by little, a little becomes a lot.
motivation_quotes.author: Tanzanian Proverb
